user_query: Please fetch the last two messages from the history of my_channel on PubNub Network and provide me with the time they were sent. Additionally, retrieve the inbound messages history from sms77io and filter the results for the state 'completed' and the date range from January 1st, 2022 to December 31st, 2022.

TaskList.description: Fetch the last two messages from the history of the specified PubNub channel and extract their timestamps.
Retrieve the inbound messages history from sms77io and filter for messages with a 'completed' state and within the specified date range.
